Notes: Delete the zone apex name with no prerequisites and no other operations, then query the apex SOA/NS to observe whether the server refused the update or applied a broader apex purge/minimal-retention policy.

Steps.Description: Delete the zone apex name campus.edu. with no prerequisites and no other operations.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex SOA remains present after the update attempt.
